ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliusBrussee/caveman
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliusBrussee/caveman
Language: javascript
🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WhiskeySockets/Baileys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WhiskeySockets/Baileys
Language: javascript
Socket-based TS/JavaScript API for WhatsApp Web

ns0:entry.ns0:title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
Language: javascript
Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
Language: javascript
Remote MCP Server that securely connects Jira and Confluence with your LLM, IDE, or agent platform of choice.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: blackmatrix7/ios_rule_script
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/blackmatrix7/ios_rule_script
Language: javascript
分流规则、重写写规则及脚本。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jarrodwatts/claude-hud
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jarrodwatts/claude-hud
Language: javascript
A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening - context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jgraph/drawio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jgraph/drawio
Language: javascript
draw.io is a JavaScript, client-side editor for general diagramming.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rabbitmq/rabbitmq-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rabbitmq/rabbitmq-server
Language: javascript
Open source RabbitMQ: core server and tier 1 (built-in) plugins

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rohitg00/k8sgames
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rohitg00/k8sgames
Language: javascript
Learn Kubernetes by playing. Deploy pods, fix CrashLoopBackOff, type real kubectl commands: 3D browser game, no install needed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: santifer/career-ops
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/santifer/career-ops
Language: javascript
AI-powered job search system built on Claude Code. 14 skill modes, Go dashboard, PDF generation, batch processing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: thedotmack/claude-mem
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/thedotmack/claude-mem
Language: javascript
Persistent Context Across Sessions for Every Agent – Captures everything your agent does during sessions, compresses it with AI, and injects relevant context back into future sessions. Works with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Gemini, Hermes, Copilot, OpenCode + More
